debug_info.goal:
case left
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ iSupIndep fun p => ↑p c

failed_attempts:
simpa using (I.sSupIndep'.iSupIndep fun p : I => (p : PersistenceSubmodule M) c)
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff_sSupIndep] using
      (DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep (M := M) I).pointwise c
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep'.iSupIndep fun p : I ↦ p.val c)
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff_sSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep (M := M)).mono (by
        rintro _ ⟨p, rfl⟩
        exact Set.mem_image_of_mem _ p.property)
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using (I.sSupIndep.fun_comp (fun p : I ↦ (p : PersistenceSubmodule M) c))
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff] using
      (I.sSupIndep'.comp
        (f := fun p : I => (p : PersistenceSubmodule M))
        (by
          intro p q hp hq h
          exact Subtype.ext (I.sSupIndep'.injOn hp hq (congrArg Subtype.val h)))) (x := c)
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff_sSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep.image (f := fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p c))
  · sorry

classical
    simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using
      (DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep (M := M) I).pointwise_iSupIndep c
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using
      (DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep (M := M) I).iSupIndep fun p : I => p.val c
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff] using
      (I.sSupIndep (s := fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p c))
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep (s := fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p c))
  · sorry

simpa [iSupIndep_iff_sSupIndep] using
      (DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep (M := M) I).pointwise (x := c)
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSum.sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep.map (fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p c))
  · sorry

simpa [DirectSumDecomposition.sSupIndep] using
      (I.sSupIndep (f := fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p c))
  · sorry
